solutions.solution: In this series, every letter is given its alphabetical position number and one letter is skipped in between each term. Hence, the missing terms are K-11 and M-13.

Pattern of given alpha-numeric series is as follows
+1    +2    +3    +4
2 → B → 4 → C → 8 → E → 14 → H → 22 → L
     +2     +4     +6     +8
∴ ? = 22 L

Pattern of given alpha-numeric series is as follows
+3     +5     +7     +9
3 → F → 6 → G → 11 → J → 18 → L → 27 → P
     +1     +2     +3     +4
∴ ? = 27P

Pattern of given alpha-numeric series is as follows
16 → P → 3 → C → R → 5 → F → T → 8 → I → V → 12 → L → X → 17 → Q
+2        +2      +2     +2     +3     +3     +3     +3
+2     +2     +2     +2
∴ ? = X17Q

Pattern of given alpha-numeric series is as follows
3 → +3 → 6 → +3 → 9 → +3 → 12
C → F → I → L
4 → +5 → 9 → +7 → 16 → +9 → 25
24 → -3 → 21 → -3 → 18 → -3 → 15
X → U → R → O
∴ ? = L 25 O
